title: Acacia riparioides
taxonomy: Acacia riparioides is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or legume family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its compound leaves and fruit, which resemble those of other Fabaceae species. Acacia riparioides is further classified into the subfamily Mimosoideae, which includes about 1,200 species of acacia. Within the genus Acacia, Acacia riparioides belongs to a specific section or tribe, although the exact classification within the genus is not specified here. Further research is needed to provide a more detailed classification of Acacia riparioides within the genus Acacia.
